gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一部以语音留言为媒的浪漫奇遇，笑中带泪的治愈之作。
gems.whyWatchEn: A romantic comedy that turns accidental voicemails into a heartfelt connection, blending laughter and tears in a uniquely modern love story.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松浪漫、略带感伤的都市爱情片观众，以及寻求非传统相遇故事的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of lighthearted yet poignant romantic comedies, and viewers who enjoy unconventional love stories with emotional depth.
